movable_parts.name: sm_clamps_a01_dx_01
movable_parts.motion: The right half of the clamp pivots around a central pin.

movable_parts.name: sm_clamps_a01_sx_01
movable_parts.motion: The left half of the clamp pivots around a central pin.

special_notes: The two halves pivot around a common central point. The tips of the jaws should align precisely when closed. The handles may have a ratchet mechanism for locking, which is part of the static mesh and not separately articulated.
grip_location: The finger loops on the handles.
